name: Arjun Reddy Nallabothula
bio: Telugu feature film director with 12 years of experience across commercial entertainers and character-driven dramas. Known for strong emotional narrative and large-scale action sequences. Directed 3 theatrical releases and 2 OTT originals. Trained under director Sukumar as assistant for 4 years before debut.

education_training.name: Assistant Director under Sukumar

name: Priya Lakshmi Vandanapu
bio: Telugu and Tamil film casting director with a decade of experience. Have cast over 40 theatrical films and 12 OTT originals. Specialize in discovering fresh faces from theatre and regional talent circuits. Worked extensively with major Tollywood banners and two Netflix India originals.

education_training.name: Casting Director Masterclass — Mumbai Film Academy

name: Srinivasa Rao Kommareddy
bio: Veteran line producer with 22 years managing productions across Tollywood and Bollywood. Managed budgets from ₹3 crore to ₹180 crore. Known for tight budget discipline without compromising creative quality. Have completed 14 theatrical features and 6 web series as line producer.

education_training.name: Production Training under Dil Raju's team

name: Meghana Tirumala
bio: Emerging Telugu screenplay writer with a background in literature and theatre. Written 2 short films that have screened at Hyderabad International Film Festival. Currently working on a feature-length original script in the thriller genre. Looking for opportunities to write for OTT platforms.

education_training.name: BA English Literature — Osmania University
Screenplay Writing Workshop — Annapurna College of Film

name: Ravi Shankar Penugonda
bio: Executive producer with 25 years across Tollywood and Tamil productions. Founded Vennela Productions in 2005. Produced 18 theatrical releases with combined box office of over ₹1,200 crore. Currently focused on mid-budget Telugu originals for OTT platforms and international co-productions.

education_training.name: MBA — XLRI Jamshedpur

name: Kavitha Subramaniam
bio: Tamil and Telugu bilingual first AD with 5 years of floor experience. Coordinated shoots of up to 400 crew members across outdoor, studio, and foreign locations. Currently aspiring to direct. Have directed 2 Tamil short films.

education_training.name: BOFTA — Bio Oscar Film and Television Academy

name: Nagarjuna Babu Yellampalli
bio: Senior Telugu commercial film director with 20 years and 8 theatrical releases to his name. Three blockbusters in the ₹100cr+ club. Specializes in mass entertainers with strong family emotion and high-octane action. Currently finishing a pan-India multilingual action film for Sithara Entertainments.

education_training.name: Associate Director under S.S. Rajamouli

name: Divya Sree Namburi
bio: Dialogue writer from Vijayawada with a sharp ear for Andhra coastal dialect and natural Telugu speech patterns. Written dialogue for 1 Telugu web series and 3 short films. Background in journalism gives me strong research skills for period and biographical scripts.

education_training.name: BA Journalism — Andhra University

name: Prasad Varma Datla
bio: Telugu OTT director known for crime thrillers and political dramas. Directed 3 original series for AHA and SonyLIV. Strong background in investigative journalism adds authenticity to crime narratives. Currently developing a 6-episode limited series about the 1984 Telugu NTR political uprising.

education_training.name: Film and Television Institute of India (FTII) — Direction

name: Anitha Krishnaswamy
bio: Pan-South India casting director fluent in Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and English. Specializes in multi-language projects and has built an extensive database of theatre talent across Chennai, Hyderabad, and Bengaluru. Known for spotting natural talent outside the conventional film circuit.

education_training.name: Casting and Talent Management — National School of Drama

name: Venkat Ramana Sarma Guntupalli
bio: Line producer specializing in complex outdoor and international location shoots. Managed productions in Europe, Japan, New Zealand, and across India. Known for solving impossible logistical challenges and maintaining crew morale under extreme conditions. 24 years, 16 films.

name: Sahithi Prabha Veluri
bio: Fresh graduate from Annapurna College of Film and Media, Hyderabad. Completed a diploma in film direction. Looking for trainee AD positions on Telugu features or web series. Very eager to learn floor management and production coordination from experienced first ADs.

education_training.name: Diploma in Film Direction — Annapurna College of Film and Media

name: Mohammed Salim Shaikh
bio: Hyderabad-based bilingual director comfortable across Hindi and Telugu. Directed 2 AHA web series and 1 short film that won at MAMI. Strong command over Hyderabadi culture, dialect, and setting. Looking for a bilingual feature debut project.

education_training.name: Satyajit Ray Film and Television Institute — Direction

name: Lalitha Devi Macharla
bio: Independent Telugu film producer with a focus on women-led stories and social narratives. 12 productions, 3 of which have won national awards. Strong relationships with NFDC and international co-production funds. Currently developing 2 projects for the international film festival circuit.

education_training.name: MA Film Studies — JNU Delhi

name: Kiran Kumar Boddapu
bio: Senior First AD with 13 years managing complex Telugu feature film productions. Known for iron-tight schedules and the ability to keep 500+ crew members coordinated across multi-location outdoor shoots. Have worked on 5 films with 100-day plus shooting schedules.

name: Suresh Babu Thota
bio: Rayalaseema-based short film director with stories rooted in rural Andhra. 3 short films with strong regional identity, one of which crossed 2 million views on YouTube. Work reflects raw, unpolished realism and underrepresented rural narratives.

education_training.name: Filmmaking Fundamentals — MasterClass

name: Padma Sudha Rao Chintapalli

primary_craft.subcraft: Ad Film and Commercial Line Producer

bio: Hyderabad-based line producer specializing in high-end TV commercials, ad films, and music videos. Managed over 200 production days for brands including Hindustan Unilever, Samsung, and Lakme. Transitioning into web series production having completed 2 OTT productions in 2024-25.

education_training.name: Mass Communication — Osmania University

name: Aditya Vikram Nair
bio: Final year film student at Hyderabad's Image College. Written 3 short scripts and placed in the top 10 of the 2024 South Indian Screenwriting Lab. Looking for internships or entry-level writing positions to break into the industry. Influenced by Mollywood's narrative efficiency.

education_training.name: BFA Filmmaking — Image College of Arts, Hyderabad

name: Ramakrishna Prasad Maddali
bio: 30-year career Tollywood producer. Founder of Ramavidya Productions. Produced over 28 Telugu films including 6 blockbusters and 2 national award-winning productions. Mentored several now-prominent directors and actors. Currently focused on premium OTT content and international co-productions.

name: Swetha Laxmi Korada
bio: Telugu web series writer with background in engineering and tech startups. Writes contemporary urban stories about young working-class Telugu professionals. Strong grasp of current social media culture, startup world, and millennial Telugu identity. 3 series bibles written, 1 commissioned by ZEE5.

education_training.name: Screenwriting for OTT — Mumbai Talkies Workshop

name: Ganesh Chandra Addanki
bio: Telugu commercial director with a string of profitable mid-budget entertainers. Known for family-friendly action entertainers with strong second half emotion. All 4 directed films have been profitable. Camp: UV Creations and Sithara Entertainments primary collaborators.

education_training.name: AD under director Trivikram Srinivas

name: Bhavana Reddy Machiraju
bio: Specialist in child and teenage actor casting with a background in child development and theatre education. Maintains strong relationships with theatre schools, Bal Bharati productions, and school drama networks across Hyderabad and Andhra Pradesh. Also writes children's content for Telugu channels.

education_training.name: B.Ed Theatre Studies — Hyderabad Central University

name: Shiva Prasad Konduri
bio: Self-taught filmmaker from Nizamabad. Made 4 short films on a phone camera that together have over 500K YouTube views. Stories come from Telangana district life, agrarian struggles, and migrant worker stories. No formal training but strong visual instinct and authentic voice.

education_training.name: YouTube tutorials and online resources

name: Madhuri Donthi
bio: Telugu writer and documentary director with a focus on human interest stories and investigative docuseries. Directed 2 short documentaries shown at international festivals. Currently developing an original 8-episode crime-documentary series based on a real Andhra Pradesh case.

education_training.name: MA Documentary Filmmaking — University of Hyderabad

name: Raju Venkateswara Rao Paluri
bio: One of Tollywood's most experienced First ADs with 26 years and 20 films. Worked across all major Tollywood banners. Known as the go-to First AD for directors who want flawless floor discipline and complex multi-location schedule management. A production guarantee.

name: Chandana Priya Gollapalli
bio: Casting assistant with 2 years of experience supporting senior casting directors in Hyderabad. Manage talent databases, coordinate auditions, and handle talent communications. Looking for a casting associate role where I can take on more responsibility.

education_training.name: BA Mass Communication — Osmania University

name: Narayana Murthy Srikakulam

primary_craft.subcraft: Telugu Comedy and Family Film Director

bio: Telugu comedy film director with 18 years and a consistent track record of family-safe entertainers. All 6 directed features have been profitable. Specializes in situational comedy with emotional underpinning — a rare combination in Telugu commercial cinema. Camp: Geetha Arts and Sri Venkateswara Creations.

education_training.name: AD under director Trivikram Srinivas

name: Aarushi Singh Pawar
bio: Mumbai-origin writer based in Hyderabad with a sharp understanding of both Bollywood and Tollywood narrative styles. Writes bilingual scripts that travel easily between Hindi and Telugu markets. Placed in the 2024 Amazon Prime Storyteller program. 2 years writing for the ZEE Telugu digital channel.

education_training.name: Amazon Prime Video Storyteller Program 2024

name: Harish Babu Varanasi

primary_craft.subcraft: Low to Mid Budget Telugu Feature Film

bio: Line producer focused on the indie-to-mid budget Telugu film space. Known for making budgets stretch without cutting on quality. 7 completed films across the ₹3-25 crore range. Strong relationships with Hyderabad crew unions and location contractors. Excellent at outdoor location clearances in Andhra Pradesh.

name: Parvathi Iyer Natarajan
bio: Chennai-based Tamil director with a track record in grounded urban dramas and psychological thrillers. Directed 2 feature films and 3 OTT series. Known for working with naturalistic actors and drawing on real south Indian middle-class life. Currently developing a Tamil-Telugu bilingual thriller.

education_training.name: Certificate in Direction — LV Prasad Film and TV Academy

name: Venkatesha Rao Bezawada
bio: Veteran line producer who specializes in studio and song-sequence productions at Ramoji Film City and Annapurna Studios. Deep expertise in set construction timelines, shoot permits at major Hyderabad studios, and cost optimization on indoor shoots. 20 years, 11 features.

name: Srividya Kumari Tammana

primary_craft.subcraft: Children's Content and Animation Script Writer

bio: Recent animation graduate passionate about Telugu children's content. Have written 5 sample animation episode scripts for a 2D series concept. Looking for writing internships or junior positions with Telugu animation studios or children's content producers.

education_training.name: BFA Animation — Arena Animation Hyderabad

name: Mahesh Subramanyam Pisipati
bio: Telugu specialist in mythological and period films. Directed 4 successful mythological features and 2 historical dramas. Deep research background in Telugu and Sanskrit texts, traditional art forms, and period-accurate costume and set design. Currently in pre-production for a 3-part mythological epic.

education_training.name: MA Classical Telugu Literature — Osmania University

name: Nagalakshmi Devi Pulaparthi
bio: OTT-focused casting director with 12 years of experience across Telugu and Tamil digital originals. Have cast 3 Netflix originals and 2 Amazon Prime originals in South India. Known for finding actors from theatre, TV, and digital who bring authenticity to screen roles that commercial film actors cannot.

name: Ravindra Nath Rao Chigurala
bio: Telugu romantic drama director with a loyal fanbase among 18-35 year olds. Known for beautifully shot romance with strong emotional arcs. All 5 directed features made profit. Strong understanding of youth Telugu audiences and urban-rural love story formats.

education_training.name: AD under director Sekhar Kammula

name: Jyothi Reddy Gudimella
bio: Line producer focused on independent Telugu films by and about women. Have produced 2 short films and 1 feature that premiered at the Indian Film Festival of Los Angeles. Currently developing a film about the Telangana women's empowerment movement of the 1980s.

education_training.name: NFDC Film Bazaar Producing Lab

name: Anil Kumar Kotta
bio: Mid-level First AD with 9 years managing Telugu and Kannada productions. Methodical and calm under pressure. Good at managing difficult talent situations on floor. Can handle schedules from 30 to 200 day productions. Comfortable across studio and outdoor locations.

name: Sameera Begum Shaik

primary_craft.subcraft: Music Video and Ad Film Director

bio: Young Hyderabad director with a strong visual sense developed through music video and ad film work. Directed 6 music videos for independent Telugu artists and 4 TVC campaigns. Strong understanding of visual storytelling within short formats. Now looking to extend into short film and web series work.

education_training.name: Certificate in Visual Storytelling — WWI Mumbai (Online)

name: Subrahmanyam Redy Kakarla
bio: One of Tollywood's senior commercial producers. Founder of Kakarla Films. 28 years, 19 features. 4 films in the ₹100cr+ club. Well-connected with all major Tollywood talent including top heroes, music directors, and directors. Currently finalizing a pan-India film with a Rs. 200 crore budget.

name: Deepika Rani Vangala
bio: Telugu crime and thriller writer with a background in criminal psychology. Obsessive researcher who writes detail-rich procedural scripts. Wrote the feature screenplay that won Best Script at the 2024 South India Screenwriting Competition. Currently developing a true-crime docuseries about unsolved Andhra Pradesh cases.

awards: Best Script — South India Screenwriting Competition 2024

education_training.name: MSc Criminal Psychology — Hyderabad Central University
Crime Writing for Film and TV — Screenwriting Research Network
